nodes.label: React Compiler
nodes.rationale: Not enabled on this template because of its impact on dev and build performance; can be added manually via the React Compiler installation docs.

nodes.label: Oxlint Configuration (.oxlintrc.json)
nodes.rationale: For production applications, the template recommends enabling type-aware lint rules by installing oxlint-tsgolint and setting typeAware: true, plus react/rules-of-hooks and react/only-export-components rules.
